name: Dodge
entries: lf you take the Dodge action, you gain the following benefits: until the start of your next turn, any attack roll made against you has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} if you can see the attacker, and you make Dexterity {@variantrule Saving Throw|XPHB|saving throws} with {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB}.
You lose these benefits if you have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition or if your {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} is 0.
